description: Implemented Azure Data Factory for ETL processes, orchestrating data workflows across Azure services and on-premises sources, streamlining data pipeline processes
Monitored workflows and sessions meticulously, identifying and analyzing failures to enhance system reliability and ensure smooth operations

Achieved an overall 25% improvement in system performance and operational efficiency by optimizing Azure Data Factory workflows, enhancing resource management in Azure virtual machines, and refining data transformation processes in Azure Databricks
Managed Azure Cloud Services for infrastructure, provisioning virtual machines, storage accounts, and networking components to optimize system performance and cost efficiency
Utilized Azure Monitor for proactive monitoring of application health and performance metrics, ensuring rapid incident response and minimal downtime
Integrated Azure Databricks into data workflows to enable high-performance data processing and analytics, enhancing scalability for ETL pipelines

Managed and resolved technical issues across Production, Integration, and Development environments, ensuring continuous high availability and optimal system performance through Linux server management
Utilized Tidal and Control-M for job scheduling and SQL for data analysis, ensuring timely data loading and addressing user issues related to Apate, maintaining data integrity

Worked with Java Eclipse to handle frontend tasks such as XML processing, reviewed logs to identify and troubleshoot issues, and investigated Java code when required to resolve system-related problems
Ensured timely generation of extracts by monitoring rollups and fixing master ID issues, ensuring accurate and available data
Implemented Maintenance Task Instructions (MTIs) and Maintenance Task Plans (MTPs), analyzing and addressing support tickets to maintain seamless operations
Analyzed issues and recovered failed jobs in Oracle DB on Linux servers, ensuring timely data processing and coordination with source systems for file receipt
Addressed support tickets related to Customer/Partner Hierarchy, enhancing data accuracy and system functionality for improved business insights

Automated recurring file validation and transformation tasks using VBA, Power Query, and PowerShell for different workflows, collectively saving over 90% of manual effort and enabling faster issue resolution and reporting
Expertise in Power BI for creating interactive dashboards and reports, providing valuable insights into business operations and facilitating data-driven decision-making
Worked on data analysis and research projects for government organization
Gained hands-on experience in data processing and statistical analysis techniques
Contributed to research initiatives and data-driven decision making processes
Designed and implemented webpages for startup clients according to specific requirements and business needs
Conferred with clients to discuss and determine optimal layout design and user experience
Researched new software technologies and design concepts to enhance development capabilities
Designed and implemented a Railway Reservation System to manage ticket bookings, cancellations, passenger records, and seat availability efficiently

projects.title: Azure Data Factory for Data Engineers - Covid19 project
projects.description: Built and managed automated data pipelines using Azure Data Factory (ADF) to ingest, transform, and load COVID-19 data from external APIs and Azure Blob Storage into Azure Data Lake Gen2 and Azure SQL Database. Utilized ADF Mapping Data Flows for data transformations and orchestrated workflows using control flow activities.

projects.title: Power BI Dashboard for SLA Compliance and Trend Analysis
projects.description: Developed an interactive Power BI dashboard to track SLA (Service Level Agreement) compliance for incidents. Created dynamic reports showcasing SLA metrics and trend analysis over time. Utilized advanced DAX calculations for custom measures and implemented Row-Level Security (RLS) for data visibility control.

projects.title: Railway Reservation System
projects.description: Designed and implemented a Railway Reservation System to manage ticket bookings, cancellations, passenger records, and seat availability efficiently. Built with focus on data integrity and user experience.
